app.name: Wishly
app.setupBody: Add your public Supabase URL and anon key to start real authentication and persistence.

auth.name: Name
auth.resetPasswordBody: Enter your email and we will send a reset link if the provider is configured for it.
auth.resetSent: If your account exists, a reset link is on the way.
auth.confirmEmailBody: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Open it first, then come back to sign in.
auth.confirmEmailNotice: Your account needs email confirmation before you can sign in.
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Your email is not confirmed yet. Check your inbox and confirm your account first.
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.rateLimit: Too many email requests were sent. Please wait a moment and try again.
auth.confirmationResent: We sent a new confirmation email. Check your inbox and spam folder.

home.title: Your wishlists
home.question: What would you like to organize today?
home.heroTitle: Make gift ideas feel thoughtful, simple, and pressure-free.
home.heroBody: Invite friends with one gentle link. They can reserve gifts without creating an account, while surprises stay protected.
home.emptyBody: Create your first wishlist and start sharing ideas that feel natural to send.

landing.metaTitle: Wishly — Shared wishlists for better gifting
landing.metaDescription: Create and share wishlists for birthdays, baby showers, weddings and special moments. Avoid duplicate gifts and make gifting easier.
landing.heroTitle: Create a gift wishlist and share it with the people you love
landing.heroBody: With Wishly, you organize your wishes in a beautiful page, share one simple link, and help friends and family choose the right gift — with no duplicates and no awkwardness.
landing.socialProof: Built to make gifting feel simpler, more thoughtful, and less awkward.
landing.howBody: Your list is ready to share in just a few steps.
landing.stepOneBody: Add the gifts you would love to receive, with links, photos, and notes.
landing.stepTwoBody: Send your list through WhatsApp, Instagram, or your event invitation.
landing.stepThreeBody: Guests can choose a gift and reserve it so no one buys the same thing twice.
landing.featuresTitle: Easier for you. Better for the people giving.
landing.featuresBody: Everything is designed to make your special moment feel more organized and less awkward.
landing.featureAvoidBody: Each person can reserve what they plan to buy, keeping everything organized.
landing.featureShareBody: A gentle way to show gift ideas to people who asked what you would like.
landing.featureGroupBody: For bigger gifts, friends and family can contribute together.
landing.featureOneLinkBody: Your list, message, gifts, and event details in one simple page.
landing.occasionsBody: Use Wishly for birthdays, baby showers, weddings, housewarmings, Christmas, and more.
landing.useCaseBirthdayBody: Make gift ideas easier to share and easier for people to choose from.
landing.useCaseBabyBody: Show what is most useful for this moment and help guests choose with confidence.
landing.useCaseWeddingBody: Keep gift ideas and group presents clear for everyone involved.
landing.useCaseHomeBody: Turn a long list of home needs into something easy to browse and share.
landing.useCaseChristmasBody: Help family and friends choose better and avoid repeated gifts.
landing.useCaseSecretBody: Share ideas of what you would love to receive without overcomplicating the exchange.
landing.useCaseGroupBody: Perfect for bigger presents that friends and family want to give together.
landing.brazilBody: Share your list, avoid duplicate gifts and make it easier for friends and family to contribute to meaningful presents.
landing.faqTitle: Straight answers before you share your first list
landing.faqBody: Clear expectations matter when a product is asking to be part of a celebration.
landing.faqFreeA: Yes. The current product is available without charging the host or the guest for basic wishlist use.
landing.faqAccountA: No. Guests can open the public page, reserve items and interact with the list without creating an account.
landing.faqReserveA: Yes. Wishly is built to reduce duplicates by letting guests reserve what they plan to buy.
landing.faqStoreQ: Can I use products from any store?
landing.faqStoreA: Yes. You can add product links from different stores instead of being locked into one catalog.
landing.faqContribQ: Can I collect contributions for expensive gifts?
landing.faqContribA: Yes. Wishly is designed to support group gifts and contributions for higher-value items.
landing.faqPublicA: You choose the visibility. Public-link lists are shareable by URL, while private lists stay owner-only.
landing.finalBody: Build your first wishlist in a few minutes and share it with anyone you like.
landing.mockupBody: Gift ideas friends can reserve without duplicates.

lists.title: My lists
lists.emptyBody: Create your first list and share it with the people you love.
lists.profileBody: Manage your account basics and keep your sharing language in sync.
lists.profileEmptyBody: This first version keeps the focus on creating, sharing, and reserving wishlists.

discover.title: Discover
discover.body: Gift ideas for every special moment
discover.chooseListBody: Pick the wishlist where you want to add this idea.
discover.emptyBody: We do not have active sponsored ideas for these filters yet.

wishlist.emptyBody: Add a few ideas so guests can choose without guessing.
wishlist.message: I made this little list to help everyone who asked for gift ideas 💛
wishlist.updateError: We couldn't save the wishlist changes. Please try again.
wishlist.giftUpdateError: We couldn't save the gift changes. Please try again.
wishlist.editCoverError: We couldn't upload this new cover image right now.
wishlist.privateOwnerHint: Only you can see this list. Use it to track wishes and mark what you already bought.
wishlist.notFoundBody: This wishlist does not exist or you do not have access to it.

visitor.title: Choose a gift for Sofia
visitor.body: Reserve it to avoid duplicate gifts.
visitor.privateBody: The public link is unavailable or has been removed.

create.title: Create a list in a few gentle steps
create.body: Add the list type, occasion, a date, and a short message. You can polish the details later.
create.listTypeHint: Event lists work for celebrations. Wish lists are personal and can use Price Radar.
create.wishlistOccasionHint: Personal wish lists do not need a fixed celebration, but you can keep a reference date if you want.
create.coverUploadHint: Choose a photo from your phone or computer, or paste an image URL.
create.visibilityPublicHint: Best for sharing with guests by link and avoiding duplicate gifts.
create.visibilityPrivateHint: Visible only to you, for organizing wishes and tracking personal purchases.
create.radarHint: Premium wish lists can track price changes, alerts, and target prices.
create.radarToggleHint: You can activate it now and manage each item from the list later.
create.successBody: Your list is ready. Add a few thoughtful ideas, then share it when it feels right.

errors.auth: Please sign in again before creating a wishlist.
errors.profile: We couldn't prepare your Wishly profile yet. Please try again in a moment.
errors.permission: Your account is not allowed to create wishlists yet. Apply the latest database policies and try again.
errors.eventDate: Check the event date and try again.
errors.visibility: Check the visibility option and try again.
errors.coverUpload: We couldn't upload this cover image right now.
errors.coverBucket: Image storage is not configured yet for this Supabase project.
errors.coverPermission: Your session is not allowed to upload this image right now. Please sign in again and retry.
errors.coverFileType: Use a JPG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC image.
errors.coverFileSize: The cover image must be up to 5 MB.
errors.retry: We had trouble generating a public link. Please try again.
errors.generic: We couldn't save your wishlist right now.

giftForm.title: Add something thoughtful
giftForm.body: A store link, estimated price, and priority help guests choose with confidence.
giftForm.noteHint: Optional details like color, size, or what matters most.
giftForm.successBody: It is now part of the wishlist with clear status and priority for guests.
giftForm.priceRadarHint: Track prices, target prices, and useful alerts for personal wish lists.

giftPreview.fallback: We couldn't fill this product automatically. You can complete the details manually.
giftPreview.manualFallbackHint: Paste the product link and we'll try to fill in the title, price, and image automatically.

giftFunding.paymentSandbox: This sandbox checkout confirms the contribution without a real card charge.
giftFunding.checkoutNotFound: This contribution checkout could not be found.
giftFunding.temporarilyUnavailable: Group contributions are temporarily unavailable while we harden the payment flow.

affiliate.disclosure: Wishly may earn a commission from eligible purchases.
affiliate.redirectErrorTitle: We couldn't open this purchase link
affiliate.redirectErrorBody: Please go back to the wishlist and try again.

giftDelete.title: Delete this gift?
giftDelete.error: Could not delete gift. Please try again.

priceRadar.dashboardTitle: Buy your wishes at the right time
priceRadar.dashboardBody: Wishly watches price changes, highlights good opportunities, and helps you buy when it makes sense.
priceRadar.sectionBody: Track price changes and set a target price for this wish.
priceRadar.freeLimit: Free accounts can monitor up to 2 items.

priority.saleOnly: Only if it goes on sale

priceRadar.updateError: We couldn't update this radar setting right now. Please try again.

stats.potentialSavingsBody: Estimated savings if you buy now

priceRadar.emptyTitle: Want to know the best time to buy?
priceRadar.emptyBody: Enable Price Radar and track when your wishes get cheaper.
priceRadar.paywallTitle: Buy your wishes at the right time
priceRadar.paywallBody: Wishly tracks price changes, highlights good opportunities, and alerts you when it is worth buying.
priceRadar.upgradeTitle: Buy your wishes at the right time
priceRadar.upgradeBody: Wishly monitors prices, identifies good opportunities, and tells you when it is worth buying.

summary.title: Compact radar summary
summary.body: The current price is highlighted, with history and opportunity signals organized in a single card.

item.collectingHistoryTitle: We are still collecting history for this item.
item.collectingHistoryBody: Monitoring since today. Soon you will see trend, lowest price, and average.
item.historyCaptured: Enough history to show a trend.

theme.title: Personalize your list
theme.body: Choose colors that match your moment.
theme.previewBody: A warm, thoughtful page for sharing gift ideas with friends and family.
theme.contrastWarning: We adjusted the accents to keep text readable and the overall layout clean.
theme.contrastSafe: These colors keep the public page balanced and readable.

admin.accessDeniedBody: You do not have permission to access this area.

admin.validationError: Please review the form fields and try again.

reservation.title: Reserve gift
reservation.name: Your name
reservation.successBody: Thank you. This gift is now marked as reserved.

validation.passwordMin: Password must have at least 6 characters.

info.privacyBody: Wishly is preparing its privacy documentation for public launch. For now, we only use the minimum account and wishlist data needed to run the product experience.
info.termsBody: Wishly is still in an early access stage. Product terms are being finalized as the platform evolves, with a focus on clear expectations for hosts, guests and partners.
info.contactBody: Need help or want to talk about Wishly? Reach out through the current support channel and we will get back with product updates and access information.
